coverage_rules.name: EP staffed by F1 or S2
CHF staffed by F1 or S2
VA Nuclear staffed by F1, S2, or T3
VA Echo staffed by F1 or S2
VA Cath staffed by F1 or S2
Yale Nuclear staffed by F1, S2, or T3
SRC Cath optional F1 or S2
CT-MRI staffed by S2 or T3

eligibility_rules.name: EP limited to F1 and S2
CHF limited to F1 and S2
VA Echo limited to F1 and S2
VA Cath limited to F1 and S2
SRC Cath limited to F1 and S2
CT-MRI limited to S2 and T3

rolling_window_rules.name: Max 3 PTO or Research weeks in any 4-week period

consecutive_state_limit_rules.name: F1 Night Float max 2 consecutive weeks
F1 White Consults max 2 consecutive weeks

first_assignment_run_limit_rules.name: F1 first Night Float run max 1 week

contiguous_block_rules.name: S2 CT-MRI must be one contiguous run
T3 CT-MRI must be one contiguous run

first_assignment_pairing_rules.name: F1 first Yale Nuclear week needs experienced pairing

prerequisite_rules.name: F1 before Night Float needs core exposure

forbidden_transition_rules.name: F1/S2 Night Float cannot follow CCU

soft_sequence_rules.name: Penalty: F1 Night Float after White Consults, SRC Consults, VA Consults, or PTO
Bonus: F1 CHF immediately before Night Float
Bonus: F1 Research adjacent to PTO
Bonus: F1 Night Float followed by Research or PTO
Bonus: S2 Research adjacent to PTO

soft_single_week_block_rules.name: Bonus: F1 consecutive non-Night-Float rotation weeks after first 8 weeks

soft_state_assignment_rules.name: Bonus: S2 Research during final week
Bonus: S2 assignment to SRC Echo

soft_cohort_balance_rules.name: Penalty: S2 uneven Night Float distribution
